---
title: "Publications"
---

## Selected Publications

1. Spira-Cohen, E. (2025). *Building academic websites with Quarto.* Journal of Open Scholarship.
2. Spira-Cohen, E. (2024). *Reproducible publishing for academic portfolios.* Digital Scholarship Review.
3. Spira-Cohen, E. (2023). *Computational methods for research dissemination.* Proceedings of the Academic Web Conference.

## More Work

This page can be updated with full citation lists, DOI links, and conference posters.
